texto: You know my girls are so funny. You're out in the country and there are critters everywhere and they get a little like, 'Oh my God! Oh no, bugs!' and I had to say, 'Honey this is fine. This is their world and it's all part of being in the country.' I realized, 'Oh my God, my girls are really city girls.'
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Anna Gunn: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a humor. O trecho “You know my girls are so funny. You're out in the country and there are critters everywhere and t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que humor, god, city pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de city e world.

frase_original: You know my girls are so funny. You're out in the country and there are critters everywhere and they get a little like, 'Oh my God! Oh no, bugs!' and I had to say, 'Honey this is fine. This is their world and it's all part of being in the country.' I realized, 'Oh my God, my girls are really city girls.'
